economic_mechanism: A completed session gaps down at least 1%, recovers to close at or above its open, and closes strictly above a fully warmed 60-session EMA known before the signal session; the confirmed panic absorption may leave elevated put premium that mean-reverts while the longer trend remains constructive.
candidate_or_family_scope: One fixed-DNA next-bar 21-DTE approximately 0.20-delta $1-wide put credit spread across BAC, F, SOFI, PLTR, TSLL, SMCI, AMD, and AAPL at one-lot operating size.
falsifier: No named symbol passes both chronological 60% train and untouched 40% holdout on 5% adverse-leg slip and fixed-$0.01-per-leg entry/exit costs with n>=8, positive SHIP, one-lot max loss <=$300, aggregate and window drawdown <=$75, dense-negative windows <=5, and exact ledger, signal-lag, chronology, population, and capital-label integrity.

strategy_advancement.summary: No candidate moved beyond F0: the fully warmed unchanged retest completed 8/8 symbols with 0/8 complete train-and-untouched-holdout dual-cost passes and no registration-eligible ID.

search_information.summary: Built reusable fail-closed gap/trend filters and a chronological control lab, repaired understated one-lot capital reporting plus the finalizer-discovered EMA60 warm-up defect, reran the exact experiment unchanged, closed the exact family, and forced the next search into an outcome-independent underlying event-study evidence class.

useful_deltas.summary: A reusable next-bar gap-recovery chronological lab now provides fail-closed downside-gap and pre-signal trend filters, dual proxy cost axes, placebo/complement controls, conjunctive train/holdout gates, and exact integrity labels.

One-lot capital now uses the larger observed required-capital/loss value, and the declared EMA60 state now fails closed until 60 completed closes exist before the one-bar signal lag; both defects are boundary-tested.

The repaired unchanged eight-symbol experiment remained 0/8: SOFI alone was dual-cost SHIP in train and reversed to -$24.59 at 5% slip and -$19.03 fixed cost in untouched holdout; no candidate survived the complete gate.

After 16 completed wakes without strategy advancement, unchanged gap-recovery and nearby options-entry-filter reruns are quarantined; the next wake must pre-screen one genuinely new underlying mechanism before option pricing.

critic_findings.finding: F1: classify this operationally repaired run as strategy advancement.
critic_findings.rationale: The challenger finding was accepted by rejecting any advancement claim: outcome is BLOCKER_REMOVED_AND_RETESTED, retest_decision is FAMILY_CLOSED, advanced is false, and the funnel remains F0 to F0.

critic_findings.finding: F2: leave the exact gap-recovery novelty open to unchanged or nearby-threshold reruns.
critic_findings.rationale: The challenger quarantine is accepted: the exact fully warmed family key is closed and unchanged reruns require a genuinely new evidence class or mechanism.

critic_findings.finding: F3: retain a nearby options-entry-filter simulation as the next seed.
critic_findings.rationale: The merged NEXT accepts the challenger guard and forces one leakage-safe outcome-independent underlying event-study pre-screen before option pricing.

critic_findings.finding: F4: leave readiness pointing at the already completed gap-recovery experiment.
critic_findings.rationale: The stale readiness NEXT is replaced by SEARCH_DESIGN_EVIDENCE_PIVOT while B checks and BUILD/L0 authority remain unchanged.

critic_findings.finding: F5: quote nested simulator max_lots=3 as operating size for this family.
critic_findings.rationale: All capital claims use top-level candidate fields only: max_lots=1 and capital_fit_usd equal to observed one-lot max loss; nested generic theoretical capacity is not a seat or sizing claim.

critic_findings.finding: Finalizer evidence audit: the shifted EMA60 was labeled as a 60-session state even during its under-warmed first 59 observations.
critic_findings.rationale: The lab now requires min_periods=60 before shifting, the boundary test asserts the exact first-valid index and fail-closed nonfinite behavior, and the exact eight-symbol dependent experiment was rerun unchanged to the same family-close decision.

next: SEARCH_DESIGN_EVIDENCE_PIVOT: build and exercise one leakage-safe, outcome-independent underlying event-study pre-screen with placebo/complement controls for one genuinely new economic mechanism; require chronological train and untouched-holdout survival before any option pricing, and close exactly one strategy decision without reopening the gap-recovery or nearby entry-filter family.
